name: mimiron
description: Reusable skills, subagents, hooks, and automation for Claude Code — plugin-first, team-ready, least-privilege by default.

skills.name: solve-issue

scripts.description: PreToolUse hook guard that blocks dangerous bash commands in issue-solving workflows.
